$comment: Mobile Avatar Company Indicator Component Tokens
$description: Component tokens for Mobile Avatar Company Indicator — a rounded-rectangle badge displayed at the bottom-right of the avatar that shows the associated company's logo or icon. Slightly larger than the online indicator (18px vs 14px) to accommodate a legible company logo image. Has a white border ring and extends 2px beyond the avatar edge. Figma Reference: Node ID 367-5165 (extracted from Avatar component, Status icon=Company)

$component.name: Avatar Company Indicator
$component.description: A small rounded-rectangle badge anchored at the bottom-right of the avatar container, displaying the associated company's logo as an image. Unlike the circular Online Indicator, this badge uses a rounded-rectangle shape (12px border-radius) to better frame square or rectangular company logos. The badge slightly extends outside the avatar circle (right: -2px) for visual emphasis.
$component.structure: Absolutely positioned square div with rounded-rectangle border-radius. Contains a full-cover company logo image (object-fit: cover) with the same border-radius. Positioned at top: ~40px (for xl avatar), right: -2px — effectively bottom-right of the avatar with a 2px overlap beyond the edge.

usage.contexts: Used inside Avatar component when statusIcon=Company. Shows which company/organization the user is associated with.
usage.features: 18px badge, 12px rounded-rectangle (frames company logo), 1.5px white border ring, -2px right offset, company logo image fill

size.description: Mobile avatar company indicator size - 18px (width and height — larger than online indicator to frame company logo legibly)

radius.description: Mobile avatar company indicator border radius - 12px (rounded rectangle — intentionally not fully circular, frames logo better than a circle)

width.description: Mobile avatar company indicator border width - 1.5px white ring that separates the badge from the avatar background

color.description: Mobile avatar company indicator border color - white - #ffffff (creates visual separation from avatar background)

right-offset.description: Mobile avatar company indicator right offset - -2px (badge extends 2px beyond the avatar circle edge for visual prominence; differs from online indicator which sits flush at right: 0)

logo.$comment: The company logo image fills the badge container with object-fit: cover and the same border-radius as the container

border-radius.description: Mobile avatar company indicator logo image border radius - 12px (matches container, clips the logo image to rounded-rectangle shape)
